prompt: Create a highly detailed 2.5D fashion-generator portrait of a stylish young AI lady named AI Lady, shown full body on a high glass observation balcony overlooking a bright futuristic eco-city with circular towers, sky bridges, rooftop gardens, waterways, and sparkling sunlight. Pose her casually with one hand resting on the balcony rail and the other relaxed by her side, confident fashion model stance, looking toward the viewer; keep the face softly anonymized with a smooth blurred facial area while preserving realistic hair and clothing detail. Use a vertical full-body composition, slightly high-angle camera, glossy 2.5D semi-realistic rendering, crisp fabric textures, intricate lace, metallic accessories, volumetric daylight, sharp city background depth, glamorous futuristic editorial fashion photography mood, ultra-detailed, vibrant but natural colors, no text, no logo.
